goal: 让 Catty shadow 诊断区分真实切换和时间间隔边界

summary.title: 区分 Catty shadow 边界类型
summary.what: 为 Catty v0 的 trail/shadow 诊断补上 boundaryKind：buildPredictionContext/buildPredictionCase 现在会标出 surface-change、time-gap 或 latest-event；shadow dry-run 与 dogfood-health samplingFreshness 的 contextSwitch 会透出该字段；README 补充说明，避免把同一 app/domain 的长时间间隔误读成真实上下文切换。
summary.why: live dogfood-health 当前 blocked 在没有 user-prior candidate，但 samplingFreshness 显示 Google Chrome@localhost -> Google Chrome@localhost，容易被后续 agent 误判为真实上下文切换。本轮先提升可观测性，让 operator 能看清这是 time-gap 边界，再决定是否等待真实切换或采样。
summary.user_goal: 让 Catty shadow 诊断区分真实切换和时间间隔边界

decisions.chose: 只增加边界类型诊断，不改变采样策略、写入协议、memory admission 或 heartbeat。
decisions.rationale: 当前问题是可诊断性不足；直接改触发策略可能影响真实 trail 采样语义，先把 source of truth 暴露出来更小、更可验证。

decisions.chose: 把 boundaryKind 作为 PredictionContext 的可选字段，并由 shadow contextSwitch 输出。
decisions.rationale: PredictionContext 是现有 pipeline 的边界承载对象；可选字段兼容既有测试 fixture 和旧持久 prediction JSON。

decisions.point: surface-change 与 time-gap 同时满足时如何分类
decisions.chose: 优先 surface-change，只有同 surface 且超过 30 分钟才标 time-gap。
decisions.rationale: app/domain 变化是 v0 plan 里的主要预判触发；time-gap 只是同 surface 长间隔的次级诊断。

decisions.chose: 把 int_5b87e237、int_d0d9d89f、int_22f3a69f、int_6ba06425 等视为同一 Catty 分支上的前序顺序切片。
decisions.rationale: 这些 proposed intents 分别建立真实 trail、judge、持久 judgement 和 repeated-context 建议降级；本轮在其输出上补诊断字段，不反向修改核心协议。

rejected.alternative: 删除或禁用 time-gap 边界
rejected.reason: 当前证据只证明诊断不清楚，还不足以证明 time-gap 边界本身有害。

rejected.alternative: 在 dogfood-health 推荐逻辑里特殊处理 time-gap
rejected.reason: 现有 recommendedNext 已经在 repeated-context 时降级到 dry-run；本轮只需要让 operator 看清 repeated context 的边界原因。

rejected.alternative: 把边界类型写成新的 SQLite schema 列
rejected.reason: 当前 Catty prediction context 已是 JSON；新增可选字段即可兼容旧记录，无需迁移或表结构变化。

review_notes: 验证通过：bun test src/catty/trail.test.ts src/catty/shadow.test.ts src/catty/dogfood-health.test.ts，15 pass。
验证通过：bun test src/catty/*.test.ts，77 pass。
验证通过：git diff --check 与 git diff --cached --check 均无输出。
live smoke：bun src/catty/shadow.ts --limit 80 输出 Google Chrome@localhost -> Google Chrome@localhost 且 boundaryKind=time-gap。

live smoke：bun src/catty/dogfood-health.ts --date $(date +%F) --max 10 仍 readiness=blocked，blockers 为 no_user_prior_candidates/no_canary_plans/no_canary_queue，但 samplingFreshness.contextSwitch.boundaryKind=time-gap。
提交 d8104d3 只包含 src/catty/README.md、src/catty/shadow.test.ts、src/catty/shadow.ts、src/catty/trail.test.ts、src/catty/trail.ts、src/catty/types.ts；CLAUDE.md 仍是无关 unstaged dirty，未 stage、未提交。

architectural_claims: Catty v0 prediction boundary selection now preserves why a context point was chosen, not only from/to surfaces.
surface-change remains the primary app/domain switch signal; time-gap is a diagnostic classification for same-surface gaps over the existing 30 minute threshold.
latest-event explicitly marks fallback contexts when no app/domain switch or time-gap boundary exists in the available trail window.
The change is observability-only: it does not write user memory, change canary/admission protocols, or attach model calls to heartbeat.
behavioral_changes: buildPredictionContext returns PredictionContext.boundaryKind for surface-change, time-gap, and latest-event fallback cases.
buildPredictionCase carries the same boundaryKind into prediction contexts used for later judgement.
bun src/catty/shadow.ts --limit 80 includes contextSwitch.boundaryKind in dry-run/write output.
dogfood-health samplingFreshness inherits contextSwitch.boundaryKind from shadow inspection, so live readiness output can distinguish real surface switches from same-surface time gaps.

data_model_changes.name: PredictionContext JSON payload
data_model_changes.migration_notes: boundaryKind is optional; existing persisted prediction contexts without the field remain valid.

security_implications: No secrets, API keys, cookies, or ~/.agents/memory/config.json were read or emitted.
The new field is derived from app/domain/timestamp metadata already shown in existing shadow/dogfood outputs.
No model provider call, user memory write, Catty audit write, canary status update, or heartbeat wiring was added.
migration_notes: Old prediction records without boundaryKind continue to deserialize because the field is optional.
